# I18n Workflow

This file is generated by the local i18n workflow scripts.

- `pnpm run sync:package-nls` / `pnpm run sync:webview-nls` refresh extraction outputs.
- `pnpm run promote:package-nls:zh-cn` / `pnpm run promote:webview-nls:zh-cn` promote approved translations into authority.
- `pnpm run generate:package-nls` / `pnpm run generate:webview-nls` generate localized artifacts from authority.
